title: Adjustments
description: How to complete adjustments sections of your tax return using myTax.

child_links.title: A1 - Under 18 2011
child_links.description: Complete question A1 if you were under 18 years old on 30 June 2011.

child_links.title: A2 - Part-year tax-free threshold 2011
child_links.description: Complete question A2 if you were not an Australian resident for the whole financial year.

child_links.title: A3 - Super co-contribution 2011
child_links.description: Complete question A3 if you made an eligible personal super contribution (not including amounts claimed as a deduction).
